data.title: Zero Trust Model
data.description: Employs a Zero Trust model for network security, verifying every request.
data.technical_spec: Enforces strict identity and device authorization.

data.title: Robust Encryption
data.description: Uses encryption standards to protect user data during transmission.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 for secure connections and AES-256 for data storage.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent testing to identify and address vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing and threat modeling are standard practices.

data.title: Integrated Threat Detection
data.description: Deploys advanced threat detection systems to identify potential breaches.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes AI and Machine Learning for real-time anomaly detection.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Implements strategies and tools to mitigate distributed denial of service attacks.
